privileged_info_summary: The image_alt_text_audit task targets https://books.toscrape.com/, a real public web sandbox designed for web scraping practice. The task is designed to perform an accessibility audit using Screaming Frog SEO Spider, requiring agents to crawl the site, export image data as CSV, and write an audit report. The environment uses real public websites (not synthetic data). Critical finding: Current inspection of the target website shows that ALL book cover images on books.toscrape.com have proper alt text attributes (verified across home page, category pages, and product detail pages), contradicting the task's premise which asks agents to find images missing alt text and provide examples of images without alt text.
